focus_area: Build Pipeline Stabilization and Validation Hardening
maximum_allowed_surface_area: Modifications are strictly limited to fixing the build-blocking signature check in the root `pacman.conf` and adding an ISO size validation step to the `.github/workflows/build-iso.yml` workflow. No new features, configuration files, or architectural shifts are permitted.
constraints: In `pacman.conf` (root level), change `SigLevel` to `Required DatabaseOptional`. Do NOT modify `airootfs/etc/pacman.conf`.
In `.github/workflows/build-iso.yml`, add an ISO size validation step that fails if the ISO exceeds 2 GiB (2 * 1024 * 1024 * 1024 bytes).
In `.github/workflows/build-iso.yml`, ensure the `test` job executing pre-build validations does NOT use the `--privileged` flag for container execution, adhering to the principle of least privilege.
If text replacements are necessary, carefully verify the surrounding text using `sed` or targeted `grep` to ensure exact matches.
